summary: Classified the five open PRs independently as requested. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close/merge/fix actions are planned because the job disables instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr. Each PR remains open pending its own proof/review path.

actions.reason: Independent live PR inventory item with useful but unproven WhatsApp behavior changes; keep open rather than close or merge.
Draft PR with related timeout work but possible unique scope; not safe to close as superseded from the available evidence.
Focused bug-fix PR with active contributor signal and unresolved proof/check blockers; keep open for its own validation path.
Narrow docs PR with author follow-up and unresolved proof requirement; keep open, not low-signal closeout.
Small related follow-up PR with distinct behavior and unresolved proof blocker; keep open for validation rather than close as covered.
